stages.question: Which poster shows how sleep helps your brain stay sharp?

choices.text: Recharge your mind while you rest

stages.question: Which poster encourages resting to feel energetic?

choices.text: Take a short break to recharge

stages.question: Which poster reminds you to sleep wisely for better health?

choices.text: Turn on lights and play games
Stick to bedtime and get good rest

stages.question: Which poster shows that resting gives you energy for the day?

choices.text: Sleep well to refill your energy

stages.question: Which poster shows that good sleep helps you do better in tasks?

choices.text: Get rest to perform at your best
Play games all night and skip bed
